zh: 美國著名的兒童心理學家、基諾特分析、
en: The famous American child psychologist Ginott analyzed that

zh: 孩童說謊是因為害怕說實話會被挨罵、
en: children lie because they fear being scolded for telling the truth.

zh: 孩童一方面被教導不可說謊、
en: On one hand, they are taught never to lie,

zh: 另一方面孩子卻有曾因為說實話而被挨罵的經驗、
en: yet on the other, they've been scolded for being honest.

zh: 是造成孩子因自我防衞而說謊的主要原因。
en: is the main reason children lie out of self-defense.
